# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent datastore security.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups

# Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team
snapshot_repository:
  type: s3
  settings:
    bucket: my-elasticsearch-backup-bucket
    region: us-east-1
    access_key_id: AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
    secret_access_key: wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY

# Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality
snapshot_settings:
  interval: 1h
  repository: my-elasticsearch-backup-bucket
  compression: gzip
  max_restore_bytes: 50gb
  restore_intelligently: true
